title: Kawaii
description: Adds a toast and Bombon boxes!
body:
![Modfest logo](https://github.com/cassiancc/Cassians-Badges/raw/refs/heads/main/cozy/ModFest-26.svg)
#  Kawaiiiiiii!!
This mod adds **a Toast**... that can **be eaten!**

It also adds **a Bombon box!**

That... **can be eaten!**

You can also sign it and give it to your **True Love!**

The mod adds aswell as **visuals** and **sound effects** for each of teh above mentioned actions!
